title: Grandma's Yeast Bread
notes: A family favorite passed down for generations
directions: Mix flour salt sugar and yeast together|Add warm water and stir until dough forms|Knead dough on floured surface for 10 minutes|Let rise in warm place for 1 hour|Punch down and shape into loaves|Bake at 350 for 30 minutes until golden brown

title: Marlene's Coffee Cake
notes: Grandma Marlene's recipe - best served warm
directions: Preheat oven to 375|Cream butter and sugar together|Beat in eggs one at a time|Alternate adding flour and milk|Pour into greased pan|Mix cinnamon and sugar for topping and sprinkle over batter|Bake 25-30 minutes

title: Simple Chicken Soup
directions: Bring broth to a boil|Add chopped carrots and celery|Add cooked shredded chicken|Season with salt and pepper|Simmer for 20 minutes
